normalized_title: Harry loved to drive; found outside Phoenix
published_title_visible: 11. Harry Leary loved to drive. He went driving and they found him about 60 miles outside of Phoenix
published_title_evidence_status: transcribed from supplied YouTube Studio screenshot; an ellipsis marks visible UI truncation where present
working_source_title: Fireside BMX Chat w/ Greg Mathias - went driving and they found his body about 60 miles from Phoenix.
working_source_description: Harry Leary loved to drive. He went driving and they found his body about 60 miles from Phoenix. He died of heatstroke. Greg believes that Harry died Wednesday night or Thursday morning but wasn’t found until Saturday.
